items.title: French film star Nathalie Baye dies aged 77, media report
items.dek: President Macron said France had "loved, dreamed and grown up" with the stalwart of French cinema.
items.body: President Macron said France had "loved, dreamed and grown up" with the stalwart of French cinema.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: DR Congo accepts first set of deportees from the US
items.dek: The Congolese government stresses those expelled from the US are only in the country temporarily.
items.body: The Congolese government stresses those expelled from the US are only in the country temporarily.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Madonna joins Sabrina Carpenter to surprise Coachella
items.dek: The Queen of Pop makes a guest appearance during the Espresso singer's headline set.
items.body: The Queen of Pop makes a guest appearance during the Espresso singer's headline set.
